Title: Relates to coordination of policies and services of the traumatic brain injury program with the office for the prevention of domestic violence
Summary: Directs the coordination of policies and services of the traumatic brain injury program with the office for the prevention of domestic violence; includes the executive director of the office for the prevention of domestic violence on the traumatic brain injury services coordinating council.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to coordination of policies and services of the traumatic brain injury program with the office for the prevention of domestic violence
